message:
fix: resolve three crash/compat bugs in memory context and artifact merge

1. getCassMemoryContext() now passes --limit instead of deprecated --top
   to cm CLI (cm v0.2.3+) and updates help text accordingly (#7).

2. lintArtifact() guards a.calculation.trim() with a typeof check so
   object-valued calculations from ADD deltas no longer crash (#8).

3. applyAdd() now calls coerceDomainStrings() to JSON-stringify any
   domain field (calculation, statement, claim, etc.) that arrives as
   a non-string, preventing downstream .trim()/.length crashes (#9).

Closes #7, closes #8, closes #9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
